mechanism: Wider HY-IG credit spreads signal rising default risk and tightening financial conditions — bearish for equities. Spread compression is bullish.
caveats: OAS data starts 1997; pre-2000 coverage is thin
COVID March 2020 was an extreme but transient widening
Regime-model signals (HMM, MS) are fitted in-sample; use persisted probabilities only
narrative_summary: HY-IG credit spreads lead SPY by 2-3 months at monthly resolution; the pair is used as a countercyclical protection signal rather than a procyclical capture signal.

known_stress_episodes.label: GFC
known_stress_episodes.note: HY-IG spread peaked above 1500 bps; SPY -45% peak-to-trough

known_stress_episodes.label: COVID
known_stress_episodes.note: Transient widening > 900 bps resolved in 8 weeks
